final_prompt.prompt:
Create a PPT cover slide for a domestic Chinese fundraising roadshow announcement about GPT-5.5 launch (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a professional Chinese VC/PE roadshow aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be standard PPT cover layout (title prominent, speaker info section)
Subject: must include the speaker name "奥特曼" (Sam Altman)
Scene/backdrop: must include subtle tech/AI visual cues suitable for Chinese GP audience
Lighting/mood: needs a professional, trustworthy investment-grade atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a sophisticated, institutional direction suitable for Chinese VC roadshows — exact values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" or "GPT5.5" (product name), "奥特曼" (speaker name)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve Chinese domestic roadshow conventions and GP/VC professional tone
Avoid: must avoid generic Western startup pitch aesthetics; must avoid overly playful or consumer-grade styling
